title: Create a message feed page for organization communiocations

posts.author: alexvpp (Alexander)
posts.cookedHtml:
I´d like to request the creation of a Feed Page for the whole organization communication.

This feed page would work as a messages board, where the user can select who will see the messages and announcements. It would be displayed on every user workspace.

posts.author: lucina.fox (Lucy Fox)
posts.cookedHtml: agree! there are so many changes that we make and we need the ability to quickly communicate to all board users
